scripts.build: node scripts/generate-freshness-badge.mjs && python scripts/fix-wof.py public/data-freshness.json && vite build && node scripts/generate-share-pages.mjs && python scripts/fix-wof.py dist/share && node scripts/generate-sw.mjs && python scripts/fix-wof.py dist/sw.js
scripts.refresh-data: node scripts/fetch-bls-wages.mjs && node scripts/fetch-cps-earnings.mjs && node scripts/fetch-scorecard-tuition.mjs --force && node scripts/fetch-ipeds-data.mjs && node scripts/fetch-onet-data.mjs && python scripts/fix-wof.py
